entry.title: Trans women come in all different forms. Trans women can be naturally beautiful, but they can also have had tweaks without meaning they once looked like a man. Even if a trans woman once did look like a man, that also doesn’t discredit her current beauty!
entry.content: Trans women come in all different forms. Trans women can be naturally beautiful, but they can also have had tweaks without meaning they once looked like a man. Even if a trans woman once did look like a man, that also doesn’t discredit her current beauty!

entry.title: Thank you guys for sticking by me through all of my hair changes in the last year!!! Boy there were some doozies! Now I know for CERTAIN that natural is always best. But I believe that sometimes you’re gotta live and learn 🩷🩷
entry.content: Thank you guys for sticking by me through all of my hair changes in the last year!!! Boy there were some doozies! Now I know for CERTAIN that natural is always best. But I believe that sometimes you’re gotta live and learn 🩷🩷
